'''Hanchin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Qina/Legends|Qina]].

{{Planet-stub}}
